creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180575
patch to update sqlalchemy dependency

math/py-pandas currently uses SQL Alchemy 0.9 for its tests, but this version expired on 2016-03-01.

Update math/py-pandas to use SQL Alchemy 1.0 instead and remove options for databases/py-sqlalchemy08 and databases/py-sqlalchemy09 .
